        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\tf.selected = name\n\t// 固定测速：选中节点时始终执行一次 URLTest，更新延迟与存活状态\n\ttimeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = f.TestTimeout\n\t}\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tf.selected = name\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (f *Fallback) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn f.selected != \"\"\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection clears the fixed selected node so the group auto-picks first alive.\nfunc (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tf.selected = \"\"\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Providers() []P.ProxyProvider {\n\treturn f.providers\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Proxies() []C.Proxy {\n\treturn f.GetProxies(false)\n}\n\nfunc NewFallback(option *GroupCommonOption, providers []P.ProxyProvider)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp) *ProxyGroup {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tproxies := convertProxies(g.Proxies(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\t// \tproxies := collectProviders(g.Providers(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\tswitch sortMode {\n\tcase Title:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn strings.Compare(a.Title, b.Title) \u003c 0\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Delay:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn a.Delay \u003c b.Delay\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Default:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\n\tnowIsManual := false\n\tif manualable, ok := g.(outboundgroup.NowIsManualAble); ok {\n\t\tnowIsManual = manualable.NowIsManual()\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026ProxyGroup{\n\t\tType:        g.Type().String(),\n\t\tNow:         g.Now(),\n\t\tNowIsManual: nowIsManual,\n\t\tProxies:     proxies,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc PatchSelector(selector, name string) bool {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[selector]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", selector)\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := g.(outboundgroup.SelectAble)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.Set(name); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: %s\", selector, err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Patch selector %s -\u003e %s\", selector, name)\n\n\tcloseConnByGroup(selector)\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc convertProxies(proxies []C.Proxy, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp)",

        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":            f.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":             f.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":             all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\":         f.testUrl,\n\t\t\"expectedStatus\": f.expectedStatus,\n\t\t\"fixed\":           f.selected,\n\t\t\"selectedTimeout\": f.selectedTimeout,\n\t\t\"hidden\":          f.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":            f.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(touch)\n\treturn proxy\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)\n\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\tif len(f.selected) == 0 {\n\t\t\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout\n\t\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {\n\t\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {\n\t\t\t\talive := false\n\t\t\t\tif f.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(f.selectedTimeout))\n\t\t\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\t\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t\t\t_, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t\t\talive = err == nil\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\talive = proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif alive {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first\n\tvar best C.Proxy\n\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\td := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\tif d \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\tminDelay = d\n\t\t\tbest = proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif best != nil {\n\t\treturn best\n\t}\n\treturn proxies[0]\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error",

        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n\n\n      try {\n        // 参考安卓端：core 切换与 profile 保存并行，再托盘同步并刷新 UI，缩短等待\n        await Promise.all([\n          selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName),\n          doPatchCurrent(),\n        ]);\n        await syncTrayProxySelection();\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n        onSuccess?.();\n\n        if (\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n          previousProxy\n        ) {\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n\n        try {\n          await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n          await syncTrayProxySelection();\n          onSuccess?.();\n          void doPatchCurrent().catch((e) =\u003e {\n            console.warn(\"[ProxySelection] profile 保存失败\", e);\n          });\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退成功: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          );\n        } catch (fallbackError) {\n          console.error(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退也失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n            fallbackError,\n          );\n          onError?.(fallbackError);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n  );\n\n  const handleSelectChange = useCallback(\n    (\n      groupName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e\n      (event: { target: { value: string } }) =\u003e {\n        const newProxy = event.target.value;\n        changeProxy(groupName, newProxy, previousProxy, skipConfigSave);\n      },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  const handleProxyGroupChange = useCallback(\n    (group: { name: string; now?: string }, proxy: { name: string }) =\u003e {\n      changeProxy(group.name, proxy.name, group.now);\n    },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  return {\n    changeProxy,\n    handleSelectChange,\n;",

        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\");\n\n      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）\n      for (const group of groups) {\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;\n\n        const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点\n        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点\n        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const proxy of group.all) {\n          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;\n          if (!proxyName) continue;\n          \n          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点\n          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;\n          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;\n          \n          // 检查该节点是否连接成功\n          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);\n          if (delayUpdate) {\n            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;\n            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);\n            \n            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0\n            if (\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c= 1e5\n            ) {\n              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）\n              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,\n              );\n              break;\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n  };\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n() =\u003e {\n(prev) =\u003e {\n\n      let newGroup = prev.selection.group;\n\n      if (isDirectMode) {\n        newGroup = \"DIRECT\";\n        newProxy = \"DIRECT\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.DIRECT || { name: \"DIRECT\" };\n      } else if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies.global) {\n        newGroup = \"GLOBAL\";\n        newProxy = proxies.global.now || \"\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n      } else {\n        const currentGroup = filteredGroups.find(\n          (g: { name: string }) =\u003e g.name === prev.selection.group,\n        );\n\n        if (!currentGroup \u0026\u0026 filteredGroups.length \u003e 0) {\n          const firstGroup = filteredGroups[0];\n          if (firstGroup) {\n            newGroup = firstGroup.name;\n            newProxy = firstGroup.now || firstGroup.all[0] || \"\";\n            newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n\n proxies,\n    isGlobalMode,\n    isDirectMode,\n    writeProfileScopedItem,\n    normalizePolicyName,\n    matchPolicyName,\n  ]);\n\n  // 使用防抖包装状态更新\n  const timeoutRef =         "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\ntype SortMode int\n\nconst (\n\tDefault SortMode = iota\n\tTitle\n\tDelay\n)\n\ntype Proxy struct {\n\tName     string &#96;json:\"name\"&#96;\n\tTitle    string &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n\tSubtitle string &#96;json:\"subtitle\"&#96;\n\tType     string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tDelay    int    &#96;json:\"delay\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype ProxyGroup struct {\n\tType       string   &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tNow        string   &#96;json:\"now\"&#96;\n\tNowIsManual bool    &#96;json:\"now-is-manual\"&#96;\n\tProxies    []*Proxy &#96;json:\"proxies\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype sortableProxyList struct {\n\tlist []*Proxy\n\tless func(a, b *Proxy) bool\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Len() int {\n\treturn len(s.list)\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Less(i, j int) bool {\n\treturn s.less(s.list[i], s.list[j])\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Swap(i, j int) {\n\ts.list[i], s.list[j] = s.list[j], s.list[i]\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable bool) []string {\n\tmode := tunnel.Mode()\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Direct {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tglobal := tunnel.Proxies()[\"GLOBAL\"].Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tproxies := global.Providers()[0].Proxies()\n\tresult := make([]string, 0, len(proxies)+1)\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Global {\n\t\tresult = append(result, \"GLOBAL\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, p := range proxies {\n\t\tif _, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\t\tif !excludeNotSelectable || p.Type() == C.Selector || p.Type() == C.Fallback || p.Type() == C.URLTest {\n\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, p.Name())\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode,",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\t// When testurl is the default value\n\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\n\tvar url string\n\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\n\t\turl = s.testUrl\n\t}\n\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":    s.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":     s.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":     all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\": url,\n\t\t\"hidden\":  s.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":    s.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Now() string {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).Name()\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar selectedProxy C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tselectedProxy = proxy\n\t\t\ts.selected = name\n\t\t\ts.manualSelected = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif selectedProxy == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 手动选择的节点用 selected-timeout 单独测速一次，便于界面显示真实延迟\n\tif s.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s.testUrl != \"\" {\n\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))\n\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)\n\t\t_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) ForceSet(name string) {\n\ts.selected = name\n\ts.manualSelected = true\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (s *Selector) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn s.manualSelected\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection resets selection to the first proxy so no node is \"manually selected\".\nfunc (s *Selector) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tproxies := s.GetProxies(false)\n\tif len(proxies) \u003e 0 {\n\t\ts.selected = proxies[0].Name()\n\t}\n\ts.manualSelected = false\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(touch)\n}",

        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype ProxyGroup interface {\n\tC.ProxyAdapter\n\n\tProviders() []P.ProxyProvider\n\tProxies() []C.Proxy\n\tNow() string\n\tTouch()\n\n\tURLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (mp map[string]uint16, err error)\n}\n\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*LoadBalance)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Selector)(nil)\n\ntype SelectAble interface {\n\tSet(string) error\n\tForceSet(name string)\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelectionAble is implemented by groups that remember a manual selection.\n// When health check (测速) is triggered, clearing means \"all nodes not manually selected\".\ntype ClearManualSelectionAble interface {\n\tClearManualSelection()\n}\n\n// NowIsManualAble is implemented by groups that can have a \"manual\" current selection.\n// When false, UI should not show any node as \"current\"; traffic still uses first/auto node.\ntype NowIsManualAble interface {\n\tNowIsManual() bool\n}\n\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Fallback)(nil)",

describeContents(): Int {\n            return 0\n        }\n\n        override fun writeToParcel(dest: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n            writeToParcelSlice(dest, flags)\n        }\n\n        companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cSliceProxyList\u003e {\n            override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): SliceProxyList {\n                return SliceProxyList(parcel)\n            }\n\n            override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cSliceProxyList?\u003e {\n                return arrayOfNulls(size)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    constructor(parcel: Parcel) : this(\n        Proxy.Type.values()[parcel.readInt()],\n        SliceProxyList(parcel),\n        parcel.readString()!!,\n        parcel.readByte() != 0.toByte(),\n    )\n\n    override fun parcel.writeByte((if (nowIsManual) 1 else 0).toByte())\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int {\n        return 0\n    }\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cProxyGroup\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): ProxyGroup {\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/callback\"\n\tN \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/net\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype Fallback struct {\n\t*GroupBase\n\tdisableUDP      bool\n\ttestUrl         string\n\tselected        string\n\texpectedStatus  string\n\tselectedTimeout int // ms, for selected node only; 0 = use same as normal (AliveForTestUrl)\n\tHidden          bool\n\tIcon            string\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Now() string {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(false)\n\treturn proxy.Name()\n}\n\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(true)\n\tc, err := proxy.DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(f)\n\t} else {\n\t\tf.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, f.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\tif N.NeedHandshake(c) {\n\t\tc = callback.NewFirstWriteCallBackConn(c, func(err error) {\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tf.onDialSuccess()\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tf.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, f.healthCheck)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, err\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(true)\n\tpc, err := proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif f.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(false)\n\treturn proxy.SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn f.findAliveProxy(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useFallbackSwitchNotify = \n() =\u003e {\n\n\n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\n\n      // 检测到节点切换\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        // fallback 触发：清空该组的手动选择，界面不再显示「当前节点」\n        if (current) {\n          const next = (current.selected ?? []).filter((s) =\u003e s.name !== groupName);\n          if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {\n            patchCurrent({ selected: next })\n              .then(() =\u003e mutateProfiles())\n              .catch(() =\u003e {});\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;,\n          );\n        } else {\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\n          invoke(\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\", {\n            group: groupName,\n            from: previousNow,\n            to: currentNow,\n          })\n            .then(() =\u003e {\n              debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Notification sent for group ${groupName}&#96;);\n            })\n            .catch((error) =\u003e {\n              console.error(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Failed to send notification:&#96;, error);\n            });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 更新保存的状态\n    previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\n  }, [proxiesData?.groups, current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles]);\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\nfunc HealthCheck(name string) {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”\n\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t}\n\n\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}\n\n\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\n\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {\n\t\t\tprovider.HealthCheck()\n\n\t\t\twg.Done()\n\t\t}(pr)\n\t}\n\n\twg.Wait()\n}\n\nfunc HealthCheckAll() {\n\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tgo func(group string) {\n\t\t\tHealthCheck(group)\n\t\t}(g)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback).\n// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again.\nfunc ClearAllManualSelections() {\n\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\t\tif p == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}",

            "text": "\tif !ok {"

            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”"

            "text": "\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {"

          },

            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "func HealthCheckAll() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tgo func(group string) {"

            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "func ClearAllManualSelections() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {"

            "text": "\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]"

        "contents": "export const ProxyRender = (props: RenderProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const {\n    indent,\n    item,\n    onLocation,\n    onCheckAll,\n    onHeadState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n    isChainMode: _ = false,\n  } = props;\n  const { type, group, headState, proxy, proxyCol } = item;\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const enable_group_icon = verge?.enable_group_icon ?? true;\n  const mode = useThemeMode();\n  const isDark = mode === \"light\" ? false : true;\n  const itembackgroundcolor = isDark ? \"#282A36\" : \"#ffffff\";\n  const iconCachePath = useIconCache({\n    icon: group.icon,\n    cacheKey: group.name.replaceAll(\" \", \"\"),\n    enabled: enable_group_icon,\n  });\n\n  const proxyColItemsMemo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (type !== 4 || !proxyCol) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    const selectedName = getSelectedForGroup?.(group.name);\n    const manualName = getManualSelectionForGroup?.(group.name);\n    return proxyCol.map((proxyItem) =\u003e (\n      \u003cProxyItemMini\n        key={&#96;${item.key}-${proxyItem?.name ?? \"unknown\"}&#96;}\n        group={group}\n        proxy={proxyItem!}\n        selected={\n          selectedName != null ? selectedName === proxyItem?.name : false\n        }\n        showManualIcon={manualName != null \u0026\u0026 manualName === proxyItem?.name}\n        showType={headState?.showType}\n        onClick={() =\u003e onChangeProxy(group, proxyItem!)}\n      /\u003e\n    ));\n  }, [\n    type,\n    proxyCol,\n    item.key,\n    group,\n    headState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n  ]);\n\n  if (type === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cListItemButton\n        dense\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n() =\u003e {\n\n\n    // 根据模式确定初始组\n    if (isGlobalMode) {\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: \"GLOBAL\",\n        },\n      }));\n    } else if (isDirectMode) {\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: \"DIRECT\",\n        },\n      }));\n    } else {\n      const savedGroup = readProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_GROUP);\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: savedGroup || primaryGroupName || \"\",\n        },\n      }));\n    }\n  }, [isGlobalMode, isDirectMode, proxies, readProfileScopedItem]);\n\n  // 监听代理数据变化，更新状态\n;",

        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点（参考安卓端：先调 core 再更 UI，profile 保存并行或延后以提升响应）\n  const changeProxy = useLockFn(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {\n        if (!current || skipConfigSave) return;\n        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n        if (index \u003c 0) {\n          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n        } else {\n          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n        }\n        await patchCurrent({ selected });\n      };\n\n      try {\n        // 参考安卓端：core 切换与 profile 保存并行，再托盘同步并刷新 UI，缩短等待\n    }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "\tif len(groupOption.Proxies) != 0 {\n\t\tps, err := getProxies(proxyMap, groupOption.Proxies)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%s: %w\", groupName, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif _, ok := providersMap[groupName]; ok {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%s: %w\", groupName, errDuplicateProvider)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif groupOption.URL == \"\" {\n\t\t\tgroupOption.URL = C.DefaultTestURL\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// select don't need auto health check\n\t\tif groupOption.Type != \"select\" \u0026\u0026 groupOption.Type != \"relay\" {\n\t\t\tif groupOption.Interval == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tgroupOption.Interval = 300\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thc := provider.NewHealthCheck(ps, groupOption.URL, uint(groupOption.TestTimeout), uint(groupOption.Interval), groupOption.Lazy, expectedStatus)\n\n\t\tpd, err := provider.NewCompatibleProvider(groupName, ps, hc)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%s: %w\", groupName, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tproviders = append([]P.ProxyProvider{pd}, providers...)\n\t\tprovidersMap[groupName] = pd\n\t}\n\n\tvar group C.ProxyAdapter\n\tswitch groupOption.Type {\n\tcase \"url-test\":\n\t\topts := parseURLTestOption(config)\n\t\tgroup = NewURLTest(groupOption, providers, opts...)\n\tcase \"select\":\n\t\tgroup = NewSelector(groupOption, providers)\n\tcase \"fallback\":\n\t\tgroup = NewFallback(groupOption, providers)\n\tcase \"load-balance\":\n\t\tstrategy := parseStrategy(config)\n\t\treturn NewLoadBalance(groupOption, providers, strategy)\n\tcase \"relay\":\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%w: The group [%s] with relay type was removed, please using dialer-proxy instead\", errType, groupName)\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%w: %s\", errType, groupOption.Type)\n\t}\n\n\treturn group, nil\n}\n\nfunc getProxies(mapping map[string]C.Proxy, list []string) ([]C.Proxy, error) {\n\tvar ps []C.Proxy\n\tfor _, name := range list {\n\t\tp, ok := mapping[name]\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"'%s' not found\", name)\n\t\t}\n\t\tps = append(ps, p)\n\t}\n\treturn ps, nil\n}\n\nfunc getProviders(mapping map[string]P.ProxyProvider,",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.component\n\nimport android.graphics.Color\nimport android.graphics.Paint\nimport android.graphics.Path\nimport android.graphics.Rect\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.Proxy\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.ProxyState\nimport kotlin.math.absoluteValue\nimport kotlin.math.max\n\nclass ProxyViewState(\n    val config: ProxyViewConfig,\n    val proxy: Proxy,\n    private val parent: ProxyState,\n    private val link: ProxyState?\n) {\n    val paint = Paint()\n    val rect = Rect()\n    val path = Path()\n\n    var title: String = \"\"\n    var subtitle: String = \"\"\n    var delayText: String = \"\"\n    var delayTimeout: Boolean = false\n    var background: Int = config.unselectedBackground\n    var controls: Int = config.unselectedControl\n\n    private var delay: Int = 0\n    private var selected: Boolean = false\n    /** True when this node is the current one AND was manually selected (show manual icon). */\n    val isManualSelection: Boolean get() = selected \u0026\u0026 parent.nowIsManual\n\n    /** Current selected node name of this group (for UI e.g. scroll-to-current). */\n    val currentGroupNow: String get() = parent.now\n    private var parentNow: String = \"\"\n    private var parentNowIsManual: Boolean = false\n    private var linkNow: String? = null\n\n    private var lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n\n    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false",

[]).find((s) =\u003e s.name === groupName);\n      return entry?.now;\n    },\n    [groups, current?.selected],\n  );\n\n  const availableGroups = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!groups) return [];\n    // 在链式代理模式下，仅显示支持选择节点的 Selector 代理组\n    return isChainMode\n      ? groups.filter((g: any) =\u003e g.type === \"Selector\")\n      : groups;\n  }, [groups, isChainMode]);\n\n  const defaultRuleGroup = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (isChainMode \u0026\u0026 mode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 availableGroups.length \u003e 0) {\n      return availableGroups[0].name;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }, [availableGroups, isChainMode, mode]);\n\n  const activeSelectedGroup = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e selectedGroup ?? defaultRuleGroup,\n    [selectedGroup, defaultRuleGroup],\n  );\n\n  const { renderList, onProxies, onHeadState } = useRenderList(\n    mode,\n    isChainMode,\n    activeSelectedGroup,\n  );\n\n  const getGroupHeadState = useCallback(\n    (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n      const headItem = renderList.find(\n        (item) =\u003e item.type === 1 \u0026\u0026 item.group?.name === groupName,\n      );\n      return headItem?.headState;\n    },\n    [renderList],\n  );\n\n  // 统代理选择\n  const { handleProxyGroupChange } = useProxySelection({\n    onSuccess: () =\u003e {\n      onProxies();\n    },\n    onError: (error) =\u003e {\n      console.error(\"代理切换失败\", error);\n      onProxies();\n    },\n  });\n\n  const virtuosoRef = useRef\u003cVirtuosoHandle\u003e(null);\n  const scrollPositionRef = useRef\u003cRecord\u003cstring, number\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [showScrollTop, setShowScrollTop] = useState(false);\n  const scrollerRef = useRef\u003cElement | null\u003e(null);\n\n  // 从 localStorage 恢复滚动位置\n;",

        "contents": "func (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\t// When testurl is the default value\n\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\n\tvar url string\n\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\n\t\turl = s.testUrl\n\t}\n\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":    s.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":     s.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":     all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\": url,\n\t\t\"hidden\":  s.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":    s.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Now() string {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).Name()\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar selectedProxy C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tselectedProxy = proxy\n\t\t\ts.selected = name\n\t\t\ts.manualSelected = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif selectedProxy == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 手动选择的节点用 selected-timeout 单独测速一次，便于界面显示真实延迟\n\tif s.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s.testUrl != \"\" {\n\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))\n\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)\n\t\t_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) ForceSet(name string) {\n\ts.selected = name\n\ts.manualSelected = true\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (s *Selector) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn s.manualSelected\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection resets selection to the first proxy so no node is \"manually selected\".\nfunc (s *Selector) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tproxies := s.GetProxies(false)\n\tif len(proxies) \u003e 0 {\n\t\ts.selected = proxies[0].Name()\n\t}\n\ts.manualSelected = false\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(touch)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp) *ProxyGroup {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tproxies := convertProxies(g.Proxies(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\t// \tproxies := collectProviders(g.Providers(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\tswitch sortMode {\n\tcase Title:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn strings.Compare(a.Title, b.Title) \u003c 0\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Delay:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn a.Delay \u003c b.Delay\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Default:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\n\tnowIsManual := false\n\tif manualable, ok := g.(outboundgroup.NowIsManualAble); ok {\n\t\tnowIsManual = manualable.NowIsManual()\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026ProxyGroup{\n\t\tType:        g.Type().String(),\n\t\tNow:         g.Now(),\n\t\tNowIsManual: nowIsManual,\n\t\tProxies:     proxies,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc PatchSelector(selector, name string) bool {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[selector]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", selector)\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := g.(outboundgroup.SelectAble)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.Set(name); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: %s\", selector, err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Patch selector %s -\u003e %s\", selector, name)\n\n\tcloseConnByGroup(selector)\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc convertProxies(proxies []C.Proxy, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp)",

patchSelector(names[it.index], it.name)\n\n                                states[it.index].now = it.name\n                                states[it.index].nowIsManual = true\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { mode, isChainMode = false, chainConfigData } = props;\n  const [proxyChain, setProxyChain] = useState\u003cProxyChainItem[]\u003e(() =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const saved = localStorage.getItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      if (saved) {\n        return JSON.parse(saved);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // ignore\n    }\n    return [];\n  });\n  const [selectedGroup, setSelectedGroup] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (proxyChain.length \u003e 0) {\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-items\", JSON.stringify(proxyChain));\n    } else {\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n    }\n  }, [proxyChain]);\n  const [ruleMenuAnchor, setRuleMenuAnchor] = useState\u003cnull | HTMLElement\u003e(\n    null,\n  );\n  const [duplicateWarning, setDuplicateWarning] = useState\u003c{\n    open: boolean;\n    message: string;\n  }\u003e({ open: false, message: \"\" });\n\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const { proxies: proxiesData } = useAppData();\n  const { current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles } = useProfiles();\n  const groups = proxiesData?.groups;\n\n  // 使用核心返回的 group.now 标记每个组当前使用的节点\n  const selectedByGroup = useMemo((): Map\u003cstring, string\u003e =\u003e {\n    const g = groups;\n    if (!g?.length) return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\n    return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e(\n      g\n        .filter(\n          (x: { name?: string; now?: string }) =\u003e\n            x.name != null \u0026\u0026 x.now != null,\n        )\n        .map(\n          (x: { name: string; now: string }) =\u003e\n            [x.name, x.now] as [string, string],\n        ),\n    );\n  }, [groups]);\n\n  const getSelectedForGroup = useCallback(\n    (groupName: string): string | undefined =\u003e selectedByGroup.get(groupName),\n    [selectedByGroup],\n  );\n\n  // 仅 Selector 组且该选择来自 profile 的 current.selected 时视为「手动选择」（参考安卓端 nowIsManual）\n;",

            "text": "    if (!g?.length) return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      g"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "        .filter("

          {

            "text": "            x.name != null \u0026\u0026 x.now != null,"

          {

            "text": "        .map("

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.component\n\nimport android.graphics.Color\nimport android.graphics.Paint\nimport android.graphics.Path\nimport android.graphics.Rect\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.Proxy\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.ProxyState\nimport kotlin.math.absoluteValue\nimport kotlin.math.max\n\nclass ProxyViewState(\n    val config: ProxyViewConfig,\n    val proxy: Proxy,\n    private val parent: ProxyState,\n    private val link: ProxyState?\n) {\n    val paint = Paint()\n    val rect = Rect()\n    val path = Path()\n\n    var title: String = \"\"\n    var subtitle: String = \"\"\n    var delayText: String = \"\"\n    var delayTimeout: Boolean = false\n    var background: Int = config.unselectedBackground\n    var controls: Int = config.unselectedControl\n\n    private var delay: Int = 0\n    private var selected: Boolean = false\n    /** True when this node is the current one AND was manually selected (show manual icon). */\n    val isManualSelection: Boolean get() = selected \u0026\u0026 parent.nowIsManual\n\n    /** Current selected node name of this group (for UI e.g. scroll-to-current). */\n    val currentGroupNow: String get() = parent.now\n    private var parentNow: String = \"\"\n    private var parentNowIsManual: Boolean = false\n    private var linkNow: String? = null\n\n    private var lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n\n    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyRender = (props: RenderProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const {\n    indent,\n    item,\n    onLocation,\n    onCheckAll,\n    onHeadState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n    isChainMode: _ = false,\n  } = props;\n  const { type, group, headState, proxy, proxyCol } = item;\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const enable_group_icon = verge?.enable_group_icon ?? true;\n  const mode = useThemeMode();\n  const isDark = mode === \"light\" ? false : true;\n  const itembackgroundcolor = isDark ? \"#282A36\" : \"#ffffff\";\n  const iconCachePath = useIconCache({\n    icon: group.icon,\n    cacheKey: group.name.replaceAll(\" \", \"\"),\n    enabled: enable_group_icon,\n  });\n\n  const proxyColItemsMemo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (type !== 4 || !proxyCol) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    const selectedName = getSelectedForGroup?.(group.name);\n    const manualName = getManualSelectionForGroup?.(group.name);\n    return proxyCol.map((proxyItem) =\u003e (\n      \u003cProxyItemMini\n        key={&#96;${item.key}-${proxyItem?.name ?? \"unknown\"}&#96;}\n        group={group}\n        proxy={proxyItem!}\n        selected={\n          selectedName != null ? selectedName === proxyItem?.name : false\n        }\n        showManualIcon={manualName != null \u0026\u0026 manualName === proxyItem?.name}\n        showType={headState?.showType}\n        onClick={() =\u003e onChangeProxy(group, proxyItem!)}\n      /\u003e\n    ));\n  }, [\n    type,\n    proxyCol,\n    item.key,\n    group,\n    headState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n  ]);\n\n  if (type === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cListItemButton\n        dense\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\tf.selected = name\n\t// 固定测速：选中节点时始终执行一次 URLTest，更新延迟与存活状态\n\ttimeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = f.TestTimeout\n\t}\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tf.selected = name\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (f *Fallback) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn f.selected != \"\"\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection clears the fixed selected node so the group auto-picks first alive.\nfunc (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tf.selected = \"\"\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Providers() []P.ProxyProvider {\n\treturn f.providers\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Proxies() []C.Proxy {\n\treturn f.GetProxies(false)\n}\n\nfunc NewFallback(option *GroupCommonOption, providers []P.ProxyProvider)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false\n\n        if (proxy.type.group) {\n            title = proxy.name\n\n            if (link == null) {\n                subtitle = proxy.type.name\n            } else {\n                if (linkNow !== link.now) {\n                    linkNow = link.now\n\n                    subtitle = \"%s(%s)\".format(\n                        proxy.type.name,\n                        link.now.ifEmpty { \"*\" }\n                    )\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            title = proxy.title\n            subtitle = proxy.subtitle\n        }\n\n        if (delay != proxy.delay) {\n            delay = proxy.delay\n            if (proxy.delay in 0..Short.MAX_VALUE) {\n                delayText = proxy.delay.toString()\n                delayTimeout = false\n            } else {\n                delayText = \"T\"\n                delayTimeout = true\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (parentNow !== parent.now || parentNowIsManual != parent.nowIsManual) {\n            parentNow = parent.now\n            parentNowIsManual = parent.nowIsManual\n            // 始终高亮 core 的「当前节点」；仅当该节点为手动选择时显示手动标志\n            selected = proxy.name == parent.now\n        }\n\n        controls = if (selected) config.selectedControl else config.unselectedControl\n\n        if (snap) {\n            background = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground\n        } else {\n            val target = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst checkCurrentProxyDelay = \n\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newProxy = event.target.value;\n      const currentGroup = state.selection.group;\n      const previousProxy = state.selection.proxy;\n\n      debouncedSetState((prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null,\n      }));\n\n      if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n        writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n      }\n\n      const skipConfigSave = isGlobalMode || isDirectMode;\n      handleSelectChange(currentGroup, previousProxy, skipConfigSave)(event);\n\n      // 手动切换节点后立即检测新节点延迟，以显示最新速度\n      const newProxyRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[newProxy] ?? null;\n      if (newProxyRecord) {\n        checkCurrentProxyDelay({\n          groupName: currentGroup,\n          proxyName: newProxy,\n          proxyRecord: newProxyRecord,\n        });\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      isGlobalMode,\n      state.selection,\n      state.proxyData.records,\n      debouncedSetState,\n      handleSelectChange,\n      writeProfileScopedItem,\n      checkCurrentProxyDelay,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 导航到代理页面\n  const goToProxies = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    navigate(\"/proxies\");\n  }, [navigate]);\n\n  // 获取要显示的代理节点\n  const currentProxy = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return state.displayProxy;\n  }, [state.displayProxy]);\n\n  // 获取当前节点的延迟（增加非空校验）\n  const currentDelay =\n    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group\n      ? delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, state.selection.group)\n      : -1;\n\n  // 信号图标（增加非空校验）\n  const signalInfo =\n    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group\n      ? getSignalIcon(currentDelay)\n      : { icon: \u003cSignalNone /\u003e, text: \"未初始化\", color: \"text.secondary\" };\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n  }\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  ExpandLessRounded,\n  ExpandMoreRounded,\n  InboxRounded,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  alpha,\n  Box,\n  ListItemText,\n  ListItemButton,\n  Typography,\n  styled,\n  Chip,\n  Tooltip,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\n\nimport { useIconCache } from \"@/hooks/use-icon-cache\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useThemeMode } from \"@/services/states\";\n\nimport { ProxyHead } from \"./proxy-head\";\nimport { ProxyItem } from \"./proxy-item\";\nimport { ProxyItemMini } from \"./proxy-item-mini\";\nimport { HeadState } from \"./use-head-state\";\nimport type { IRenderItem } from \"./use-render-list\";\n\ninterface RenderProps {\n  item: IRenderItem;\n  indent: boolean;\n  isChainMode?: boolean;\n  onLocation: (group: IRenderItem[\"group\"]) =\u003e void;\n  onCheckAll: (groupName: string) =\u003e void;\n  onHeadState: (groupName: string, patch: Partial\u003cHeadState\u003e) =\u003e void;\n  onChangeProxy: (\n    group: IRenderItem[\"group\"],\n    proxy: IRenderItem[\"proxy\"] \u0026 { name: string },\n  ) =\u003e void;\n  /** 当前使用的节点名（用于高亮） */\n  getSelectedForGroup?: (groupName: string) =\u003e string | undefined;\n  /** 仅当返回值等于节点名时显示「手动选择」图标（仅 Selector 组，Fallback/URLTest 不显示） */\n  getManualSelectionForGroup?: (groupName: string) =\u003e string | undefined;\n}\n\nexport const ProxyRender = (props: RenderProps) =\u003e\n;",

        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n\n\n      try {\n        // 参考安卓端：core 切换与 profile 保存并行，再托盘同步并刷新 UI，缩短等待\n        await Promise.all([\n          selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName),\n          doPatchCurrent(),\n        ]);\n        await syncTrayProxySelection();\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n        onSuccess?.();\n\n        if (\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n          previousProxy\n        ) {\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n\n        try {\n          await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n          await syncTrayProxySelection();\n          onSuccess?.();\n          void doPatchCurrent().catch((e) =\u003e {\n            console.warn(\"[ProxySelection] profile 保存失败\", e);\n          });\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退成功: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          );\n        } catch (fallbackError) {\n          console.error(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退也失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n            fallbackError,\n          );\n          onError?.(fallbackError);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n  );\n\n  const handleSelectChange = useCallback(\n    (\n      groupName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e\n      (event: { target: { value: string } }) =\u003e {\n        const newProxy = event.target.value;\n        changeProxy(groupName, newProxy, previousProxy, skipConfigSave);\n      },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  const handleProxyGroupChange = useCallback(\n    (group: { name: string; now?: string }, proxy: { name: string }) =\u003e {\n      changeProxy(group.name, proxy.name, group.now);\n    },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  return {\n    changeProxy,\n    handleSelectChange,\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const [state, setState] = useState\u003cProxyState\u003e({\n    proxyData: {\n      groups: [],\n      records: {},\n    },\n    selection: {\n      group: \"\",\n      proxy: \"\",\n    },\n    displayProxy: null,\n  });\n\n  const autoCheckInProgressRef = useRef(false);\n  const latestProxyRecordRef = useRef\u003cany | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!state.selection.proxy) {\n      latestProxyRecordRef.current = null;\n      return;\n    }\n    latestProxyRecordRef.current =\n      state.proxyData.records?.[state.selection.proxy] || null;\n  }, [state.selection.proxy, state.proxyData.records]);\n\n  // 初始化选择的组\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return;\n\n    const getPrimaryGroupName = () =\u003e {\n      if (!proxies?.groups?.length) return \"\";\n\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        proxies.groups.find((group: { name: string }) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) ||\n        proxies.groups.filter((g: { name: string }) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      return primaryGroup?.name || \"\";\n    };\n\n    const primaryGroupName = getPrimaryGroupName();\n\n    // 根据模式确定初始组\n    if (isGlobalMode)\n  }\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n                )}\n                {currentProxy.mptcp \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cChip size=\"small\" label=\"MPTCP\" variant=\"outlined\" /\u003e\n                )}\n                {currentProxy.smux \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cChip size=\"small\" label=\"SMUX\" variant=\"outlined\" /\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/Box\u003e\n            \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n            {/* 显示延迟 */}\n            {currentProxy \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cChip\n                size=\"small\"\n                label={delayManager.formatDelay(currentDelay)}\n                color={convertDelayColor(currentDelay)}\n              /\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n          {/* 代理组选择器 */}\n          \u003cFormControl\n            fullWidth\n            variant=\"outlined\"\n            size=\"small\"\n            sx={{ mb: 1.5 }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cInputLabel id=\"proxy-group-select-label\"\u003e\n              {t(\"home.components.currentProxy.labels.group\")}\n            \u003c/InputLabel\u003e\n            \u003cSelect\n              labelId=\"proxy-group-select-label\"\n              value={state.selection.group}\n              onChange={handleGroupChange}\n              label={t(\"home.components.currentProxy.labels.group\")}\n              disabled={isGlobalMode || isDirectMode}\n            \u003e\n              {state.proxyData.groups.map((group) =\u003e (\n                \u003cMenuItem key={group.name} value={group.name}\u003e\n                  {group.name}\n                \u003c/MenuItem\u003e\n              ))}\n            \u003c/Select\u003e\n          \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n\n          {/* 代理节点选择器 */}\n          \u003cFormControl fullWidth variant=\"outlined\" size=\"small\" sx={{ mb: 0 }}\u003e\n            \u003cInputLabel id=\"proxy-select-label\"\u003e\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\nfunc HealthCheck(name string) {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”\n\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t}\n\n\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}\n\n\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\n\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {\n\t\t\tprovider.HealthCheck()\n\n\t\t\twg.Done()\n\t\t}(pr)\n\t}\n\n\twg.Wait()\n}\n\nfunc HealthCheckAll() {\n\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tgo func(group string) {\n\t\t\tHealthCheck(group)\n\t\t}(g)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback).\n// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again.\nfunc ClearAllManualSelections() {\n\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\t\tif p == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "use crate::{\n    cmd,\n    config::{Config, PrfItem, PrfOption, profiles::profiles_draft_update_item_safe},\n    core::{CoreManager, handle, tray},\n};\nuse anyhow::{Result, bail};\nuse clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging, logging_error};\nuse smartstring::alias::String;\nuse tauri::Emitter as _;\n\n/// Toggle proxy profile\npub async fn toggle_proxy_profile(profile_index: String) {\n    logging_error!(\n        Type::Config,\n        cmd::patch_profiles_config_by_profile_index(profile_index).await\n    );\n}\n\npub async fn switch_proxy_node(group_name: \u0026str, proxy_name: \u0026str) {\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"切换代理成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = handle::Handle::app_handle().emit(\"verge://refresh-proxy-config\", ());\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n            return;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"切换代理失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"代理切换回退成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"代理切换最终失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn should_update_profile",

 newProxy = \"DIRECT\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.DIRECT || { name: \"DIRECT\" };\n      } else if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies.global) {\n        newGroup = \"GLOBAL\";\n        newProxy = proxies.global.now || \"\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n      } else {\n        const currentGroup = filteredGroups.find(\n          (g: { name:       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const debouncedSetState = useCallback(\n    (updateFn: (prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ProxyState) =\u003e {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) {\n        clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      }\n      timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n        setState(updateFn);\n      }, 300);\n    },\n    [setState],\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理组变更\n  const handleGroupChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isGlobalMode || isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newGroup = event.target.value;\n\n      writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_GROUP, newGroup);\n\n      setState((prev) =\u003e {\n        const group = prev.proxyData.groups.find(\n          (g: { name: string }) =\u003e g.name === newGroup,\n        );\n        if (group) {\n          return {\n            ...prev,\n            selection: {\n              group: newGroup,\n              proxy: group.now,\n            },\n            displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[group.now] || null,\n          };\n        }\n        return {\n          ...prev,\n          selection: {\n            ...prev.selection,\n            group: newGroup,\n          },\n        };\n      });\n    },\n    [isGlobalMode, isDirectMode, writeProfileScopedItem],\n  );\n\n  // 对指定节点做延迟检测；不传 override 时使用当前选中节点（供定时/自动检测用）\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype Selector struct {\n\t*GroupBase\n\tdisableUDP       bool\n\tselected         string\n\tmanualSelected   bool // true only after user or persist Set(); cleared by ClearManualSelection/health/stop\n\ttestUrl          string\n\texpectedStatus   string\n\tselectedTimeout  int // ms, for manual-selected node delay test; 0 = skip\n\tHidden           bool\n\tIcon             string\n}\n\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\n\tc, err := s.selectedProxy(true).DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(s)\n\t}\n\treturn c, err\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tpc, err := s.selectedProxy(true).ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(s)\n\t}\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif s.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook\nexport const useCurrentProxy = () =\u003e {\n  // 从AppDataProvider获取数据\n  const { proxies, clashConfig, refreshProxy } = useAppData();\n\n  // 获取当前模式\n  const currentMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n\n  // 获取当前代理节点信息\n  const currentProxyInfo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName: null };\n\n    const { global, groups, records } = proxies;\n\n    // 默认信息\n    let primaryGroupName = \"GLOBAL\";\n    let currentName = global?.now;\n\n    // 在规则模式下，寻找主要代理组（通常是第一个或者名字包含特定关键词的组）\n    if (currentMode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 groups.length \u003e 0) {\n      // 查找主要的代理组（优先级：包含关键词 \u003e 第一个非GLOBAL组）\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        groups.find((group: ProxyGroup) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) || groups.filter((g: ProxyGroup) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      if (primaryGroup) {\n        primaryGroupName = primaryGroup.name;\n        currentName = primaryGroup.now;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 如果找不到当前节点，返回null\n    if (!currentName) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName };\n\n    // 获取完整的节点信息\n    const currentProxy = records[currentName] || {\n      name: currentName,\n      type: \"Unknown\",\n      udp: false,\n      xudp: false,\n      tfo: false,\n      mptcp: false,\n      smux: false,\n      history: [],\n    };\n\n    return { currentProxy, primaryGroupName };\n  }, [proxies, currentMode]);\n\n  return {\n    currentProxy: currentProxyInfo.currentProxy,\n    primaryGroupName: currentProxyInfo.primaryGroupName,\n    mode: currentMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n  };\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n//#include \"bridge.h\"\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"unsafe\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n)\n\n//export queryTunnelState\nfunc queryTunnelState() *C.char {\n\tmode := tunnel.QueryMode()\n\n\tresponse := \u0026struct {\n\t\tMode string &#96;json:\"mode\"&#96;\n\t}{mode}\n\n\treturn marshalJson(response)\n}\n\n//export queryNow\nfunc queryNow(upload, download *C.uint64_t) {\n\tup, down := tunnel.Now()\n\n\t*upload = C.uint64_t(up)\n\t*download = C.uint64_t(down)\n}\n\n//export queryTotal\nfunc queryTotal(upload, download *C.uint64_t) {\n\tup, down := tunnel.Total()\n\n\t*upload = C.uint64_t(up)\n\t*download = C.uint64_t(down)\n}\n\n//export queryGroupNames\nfunc queryGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable C.int) *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(tunnel.QueryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable != 0))\n}\n\n//export queryGroup\nfunc queryGroup(name C.c_string, sortMode C.c_string) *C.char {\n\tn := C.GoString(name)\n\ts := C.GoString(sortMode)\n\n\tmode := tunnel.Default\n\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase \"Title\":\n\t\tmode = tunnel.Title\n\tcase \"Delay\":\n\t\tmode = tunnel.Delay\n\t}\n\n\tresponse := tunnel.QueryProxyGroup(n, mode, app.SubtitlePattern())\n\n\tif response == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn marshalJson(response)\n}\n\n//export healthCheck\nfunc healthCheck(completable unsafe.Pointer, name C.c_string) {\n\tgo func(name string) {\n\t\ttunnel.HealthCheck(name)\n\n\t\tC.complete(completable, nil)\n\t}(C.GoString(name))\n}\n\n//export healthCheckAll\nfunc healthCheckAll() {\n\ttunnel.HealthCheckAll()\n}\n\n//export patchSelector\nfunc patchSelector(selector, name C.c_string) C.int {\n\ts := C.GoString(selector)\n\tn := C.GoString(name)\n\n\tif tunnel.PatchSelector(s, n) {\n\t\treturn 1\n\t}\n\n\treturn 0\n}\n\n//export clearAllManualSelections\nfunc clearAllManualSelections() {\n\ttunnel.ClearAllManualSelections()\n}\n\n//export queryProviders\nfunc queryProviders() *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(tunnel.QueryProviders())\n}\n\n//export queryConnections\nfunc queryConnections() *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(queryConnectionsSnapshot())\n}\n\n//export closeConnection\nfunc closeConnection(id C.c_string) C.int {\n\tif closeConnectionByID(C.GoString(id)) {\n\t\treturn 1\n\t}\n\treturn 0\n}",

        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype ProxyGroup interface {\n\tC.ProxyAdapter\n\n\tProviders() []P.ProxyProvider\n\tProxies() []C.Proxy\n\tNow() string\n\tTouch()\n\n\tURLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (mp map[string]uint16, err error)\n}\n\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*LoadBalance)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Selector)(nil)\n\ntype SelectAble interface {\n\tSet(string) error\n\tForceSet(name string)\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelectionAble is implemented by groups that remember a manual selection.\n// When health check (测速) is triggered, clearing means \"all nodes not manually selected\".\ntype ClearManualSelectionAble interface {\n\tClearManualSelection()\n}\n\n// NowIsManualAble is implemented by groups that can have a \"manual\" current selection.\n// When false, UI should not show any node as \"current\"; traffic still uses first/auto node.\ntype NowIsManualAble interface {\n\tNowIsManual() bool\n}\n\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Fallback)(nil)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点（参考安卓端：先调 core 再更 UI，profile 保存并行或延后以提升响应）\n  const changeProxy = useLockFn(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {\n        if (!current || skipConfigSave) return;\n        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n        if (index \u003c 0) {\n          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n        } else {\n          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n        }\n        await patchCurrent({ selected });\n      };\n\n      try {\n        // 参考安卓端：core 切换与 profile 保存并行，再托盘同步并刷新 UI，缩短等待\n    }\n;\n;",

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I need to understand:
1. Android side: how does it get groups data (now, nowIsManual)? It uses QueryProxyGroup from Go core - which returns Now and NowIsManual from the core. So on Android, nowIsManual comes directly from the core (Selector.manualSelected, Fallback.selected != "").

2. Desktop (clash-verge-rev): It seems to get groups from Tauri/app data. I need to find where desktop gets group list and whether it has nowIsManual. The proxy-groups.tsx says "仅 Selector 组且该选择来自 profile 的 current.selected 时视为「手动选择」" - so on desktop they're inferring manual from profile's current.selected, NOT from core's nowIsManual!

So the bug could be:
- Desktop might be restoring selected from profile (current.selected) and calling core to set it, but the core might be returning the first node as "now" on startup before profile is applied, and the UI shows manual flag based on profile.
- Or desktop is not getting nowIsManual from core at all - they're using profile.current.selected to decide manual, so if profile has an entry for a group, they show manual. But the actual "now" might come from groups (core) which could be first node after restart.

I will look at:
1. Where does desktop get the list of groups (proxiesData?.groups) - from Tauri API?
2. Does that API return nowIsManual from core?
3. How does desktop apply profile's selected on startup?
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


继续查看桌面端如何获取 groups 数据、是否包含 nowIsManual，以及启动时如何应用 profile 的 selected。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I need to understand:
1. Where does desktop get groups data from? It seems like desktop uses a different core (mihomo via Tauri) - I will check how desktop fetches proxies/groups.
2. On Android: QueryProxyGroup returns Now and NowIsManual from core. The core's Selector has manualSelected (set by Set/ForceSet, cleared by ClearManualSelection). Fallback has selected (set by Set/ForceSet, cleared by ClearManualSelection or when selected node dies).
3. On desktop: getManualSelectionForGroup uses profile's current.selected - only if there's an entry in current.selected for that group, it shows manual. So desktop doesn't use core's nowIsManual at all for the manual indicator!

I will find where desktop gets the list of groups (the API that returns groups with now, type, etc.) and whether it includes nowIsManual/fixed.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I need to understand:
1. Desktop gets groups from calcuProxies() - which uses getProxies from tauri-plugin-mihomo-api. So the groups data comes from mihomo core. The core's MarshalJSON for Selector does NOT include nowIsManual - it only has type, now, all, testUrl, hidden, icon. So desktop never receives nowIsManual from core!
2. Desktop's getManualSelectionForGroup uses profile's current.selected - so it shows manual icon only when there's an entry in profile's current.selected for that Selector group. But the "now" (current node) comes from groups (core). So if core returns first node (e.g. after restart, selector defaults to first), and profile has selected: [{ name: "Proxy", now: "NodeA" }], then desktop would show NodeA as "manual" in profile but core might be showing first node. Actually the issue might be the opposite: profile might have no selected (or empty), but core after restart uses first node - and somewhere the UI is showing manual icon. I will re-read.

User said: "启动之后始终会保持使用第一个节点，并且这个节点并不是我手动选择的但是上面却有手动选择的标志"
So after startup: (1) it always uses the first node, (2) this node was NOT manually selected by user, (3) but it shows the manual selection flag.

So the bug could be:
A) Desktop shows manual flag based on something wrong - e.g. it shows manual when group.now === some value and that value is incorrectly considered "from profile". 
B) Or desktop infers manual from "current.selected" but current.selected might be populated incorrectly on startup (e.g. from previous session but the actual core selection is first node).
C) Or the core (mihomo) on desktop doesn't persist/restore selection - so on every start it's first node. But then where does the manual flag come from? From profile. So maybe on startup desktop loads profile which has selected: [{ name: "GLOBAL", now: "FirstNode" }] from last time - but that was actually "first node" that was never explicitly selected, it was just the default. So the fix would be: only show manual when it's really from user selection, which could be (1) core returns nowIsManual, or (2) profile selected was explicitly set by user (we'd need to not persist "default" selections).

Actually re-reading again: Android uses core's NowIsManual - so the source of truth is the core. Desktop uses profile's current.selected to infer manual - so if profile has an entry, desktop shows manual. So when could "first node" have manual flag? When profile has selected: [{ name: "XXX", now: "FirstNode" }]. So either (1) on first use, desktop/profile incorrectly saves the first node as "selected", or (2) when user never selected anything, we shouldn't have that group in selected - but something is adding it.

I will check: when does desktop add to current.selected? In use-proxy-selection.ts when user changes proxy we patchCurrent({ selected }). So selected is only updated when user explicitly selects. But what about on profile load - does desktop apply profile's selected to the core? If desktop applies profile selected to core on config load, then core would have that node. But the issue is "始终会保持使用第一个节点" - so core is using first node. So either (1) profile's selected is not being applied to core on startup (so core always starts with first node), or (2) profile's selected is being applied but core ignores it or overwrites it. And "有手动选择的标志" - so the UI shows manual. So maybe profile has selected with first node (from a bug where we save first node as selected when we shouldn't), and that's why manual shows; and core isn't getting the patch so it uses first node. So both could be true: profile has wrong selected (first node with manual), and core doesn't get profile selected on startup.

I will find where desktop applies profile selected to core on startup / config load.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I found it! On Android:
- ConfigurationOverride.kt has `proxySelections: Map<String, String>?` - "Proxy group name -> selected node name; applied after config load so selection persists."
- So Android applies proxySelections to core AFTER config load.

I will find where Android applies proxySelections and where desktop could do the same. Also I need to check: does mihomo (desktop core) return nowIsManual/fixed in get_proxies? If not, desktop has to get it from somewhere - and currently desktop infers manual from profile's current.selected. So the bug could be:
1. Desktop never applies profile's selected to core on config load - so core always uses first node.
2. Desktop shows manual based on profile's selected - but profile's selected might be wrong (e.g. contains first node when user never selected).

I will read Android's flow: how proxySelections is applied and how nowIsManual is shown.
</details></think>
